details: Analyzed 1981 Konami classic. Documented two-zone road/river structure, discrete grid movement, riding mechanics, 3 vehicle types, 2 river object types (logs + diving turtles), scoring system, difficulty curve. Scoped v1: full playfield with 5 road + 5 river lanes, timer, progressive difficulty. Skip: alligators, snakes, fly/female frog bonuses. Estimated complexity: Medium.
platform_status: 6 games live, all verified by QA, zero bugs
